name: @pryzm/types-builtin
description: PRYZM 2 — built-in type catalogues for door, window, roof (S11) and curtain-wall (S13). v1 starter sets per SPEC-05 §7.3 (8 doors, 8 windows, 4 roofs, 4 curtain-wall systems + 5 panels + 4 mullions). Pure data; no runtime dependencies. Consumed by plugins/{door,window,roof,curtain-wall}/ as the default catalogue when no project-level type catalogue is wired.
deprecated: Wave-12 DROP: @pryzm/types-builtin had 0 importers at Wave 8 close. Verdict: DROP per docs/03_PRYZM3/04-PLAN-FORWARD/17-WAVES-9-12-SRC-MIGRATION.md §5
